message:
feat(http): add connection pool for HTTP client connection management

Implements a connection pool module with:
- PoolKey for identifying hosts (HTTP/HTTPS with host:port)
- PoolConfig for configuring pool behavior (limits, timeouts)
- Pool for managing pooled connections with acquire/release
- Connection metadata tracking (state, creation time, requests served)
- Automatic cleanup of expired idle connections
- Per-host and total connection limits

Also registers http module in lib.rs and exports pool types from http module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
